pages.text: A grand glacier — a tall, broad ice island with a frozen lake set into its surface.

$(bold)The frozen lake$()$(br)A sheet of solid ice rests in the centre. Packed ice, blue ice, and the hidden $(item)powder snow$() traps run through the core; ice spikes crown the glacier and deep-freeze variants.
$(bold)Cold company$()$(br)Polar bears, rabbits, and foxes wander the snow.
